_metadata.description: LLM-identified start lines for primary text in raw corpus files. Line numbers are 1-indexed (matching the Read tool). Files marked wrong_file:true contain the wrong text entirely.
_metadata.method: 10 parallel Sonnet agents reading first 300 lines of each raw file
